bead.title: G5: F-S3 - client-neutral MCP compat fixes (from GCP audit)

compatibility_matrix.detail: ADK launched the exact copied binary twice
metadata, preview, query refusal, invalid arguments, connection-info classification
typed OPERATING_LEVEL_TOO_LOW returned as MCP tool result
metadata call succeeded after refusal and invalid arguments
diagnostics captured separately; no synthetic secret values found
No long-running DB-free ADK tool call exists in this no-Oracle fixture
Cloud/model calls expressly excluded from this audit
Deferred by plan and outside local G5 scope
Synthetic TEST-NET profiles in a network namespace; no database available or contacted

call_checks.detail: oracle_list_profiles returned both synthetic profiles without Oracle access
CREATE TABLE classified DDL and blocked by READ_ONLY ceiling
oracle_query returned a typed MCP tool error, not an SDK exception
subsequent oracle_list_profiles call succeeded in the same ADK session
unknown argument produced the expected typed error
subsequent oracle_list_profiles call succeeded in the same ADK session
network-isolated synthetic profile returned typed CONNECTION_FAILED; live metadata was intentionally unavailable

streamable_http.server_teardown: ADK client session closed first; the local listener then received explicit SIGTERM

environment_limitations: No live Oracle: connection_info typed CONNECTION_FAILED is expected for the synthetic network-isolated profile.
No cloud/model call: Gemini declaration acceptance and Vertex agent orchestration are NOT_TESTED.
Cancellation is NOT_TESTED because the DB-free fixture has no faithful long-running call.

setup_failures.cause: StringIO was passed as stdio errlog; ADK subprocess launch requires a real file descriptor
setup_failures.resolution: Use a real evidence log file

setup_failures.cause: The cleared audit environment intentionally contained no Google ADC
setup_failures.error: DefaultCredentialsError while probing optional ADC-backed mTLS configuration
setup_failures.resolution: ADK continued successfully over the explicit plain loopback Streamable HTTP URL; no cloud request was made

publication_boundary.note: This normalized bundle preserves the local ADK/MCP proof. Raw secret-scanned logs remain untracked under target/ and are not claimed as durable repository evidence.
